title: taraxacum ibericum
intro: Taraxacum ibericum, also known as the Iberian dandelion, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Taraxacum ibericum include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, making it useful for treating digestive issues, kidney stones, and skin conditions. Taraxacum ibericum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
